title: tephroseris capitata
intro: Tephroseris capitata, also known as the purple mountain saw-wort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The health benefits of Tephroseris capitata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even have antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
